title: Send email on date with content of workcoc
excerpt: Hi, we’re using Monday as a planning tool and I’d love to make a simple automation where we in a workdoc can prepare some content for a workshop which is then emailed to the assigned user on the date of the workshop. All…

posts.author: TEAMVAERK (Morten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we’re using Monday as a planning tool and I’d love to make a simple automation where we in a workdoc can prepare some content for a workshop which is then emailed to the assigned user on the date of the workshop. All is columns in a single subitem.

I did try to figure it out, but without any luck. Is this possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Sorry for the late response here! Are you stuck on this or did you figure out a different solution? If you need help with this, please let us know at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to jump in and figure this out with you.
